queries.query: Scaffold a README from our product direction
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; README scaffolding from Arc artifacts.

queries.query: Update the README with the new wave
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; managed-section update post-wave.

queries.query: Sync the README features list
queries.rationale: Appendix A seed; explicit sync verb on README.

queries.query: The README is stale — make it match the current backlog and roadmap
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'README is stale' signals sync intent.

queries.query: Bring the README up to date before I share the repo
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'bring up to date before sharing' is sync surface.

queries.query: Refresh the managed sections in README.md
queries.rationale: Informal phrasing — 'refresh managed sections' maps to sync.

queries.query: Propagate VISION and CUSTOMER changes into the README
queries.rationale: Sync surface — artifact → README propagation is sync behaviour.

queries.query: Initialize the README for this new project using Arc artifacts
queries.rationale: Sync surface — first-time README scaffolding.

queries.query: Regenerate the README's 'Current Wave' managed block
queries.rationale: Sync surface — managed-block regeneration from artifacts.

queries.query: Run the README migration sweep
queries.rationale: Sync surface — migration sweep runs on each arc-sync invocation.

queries.query: Consolidate scattered backlog items
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-assess (Appendix A); scattered-content migration.

queries.query: What's the current status?
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-status (Appendix A); read-only pulse.

queries.query: Audit the README for broken ROADMAP references
queries.rationale: Near-miss routes to arc-audit; diagnostic sweep, not regeneration.

queries.query: Capture a new idea — improved README screenshots
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-capture; raw entry despite mentioning README.

queries.query: Shape the 'project homepage' idea into a brief
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-shape; refinement, not README sync.

queries.query: Plan the next wave with shaped ideas
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-wave; forward planning.

queries.query: Ship the README-refresh feature now that it's validated
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-ship; lifecycle completion.

queries.query: Scan the repo for scattered product content and import it
queries.rationale: Routes to arc-assess; discovery + migration, not README regeneration.

queries.query: Sync the local branch with origin/main
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; git sync, not README sync.

queries.query: Sync the application state with the backend database
queries.rationale: Out-of-domain; application-level sync, not README management.
